name: Brittany White
technical_background: Basic Tech Literacy — comfortable with technology and tools but does not code. Skilled Practitioner who understands AI concepts and uses advanced features across multiple AI tools for creative production, content creation, and design work.

current_profile.summary: Product Manager with 10+ years of experience in marketing and creative industries. Skilled AI Practitioner who actively uses ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion for creative production, content creation, and design work. Understands AI concepts deeply and uses advanced features. Comfortable with technology but does not code. Background in brand development and creative strategy with strong interest in leveraging generative AI for business growth.
technical_skills: AI-powered creative production (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion)
current_profile.ai_experience: Skilled Practitioner who uses 5+ AI tools regularly. Actively uses ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Google Gemini for research, writing, and content creation. Extensively uses Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion for AI image generation and creative production. Understands AI concepts and uses advanced features but has not built custom prompts systematically or evaluated AI outputs with formal rubrics.

learning_intent: Wants to leverage AI for creative production, brand development, and design-driven business growth. Focused on using generative AI tools to accelerate ideation, content creation, and market-facing creative work. Interested in roles aligned with AI-enabled creative leadership.

target_jd.title: AI-Enabled Creative Entrepreneur
requirements: Leverage generative AI tools for creative production and brand development
Use AI image generation (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion) for design-driven business growth
Accelerate ideation and content creation using AI tools
Develop market-facing creative work enhanced by AI
Evaluate and curate AI-generated creative outputs for quality and brand consistency

expected_skill_gaps.description: Strong communication base but needs AI-specific framing. Must learn to explain AI capabilities and limitations accurately to non-technical audiences without overpromising.
Critical for evaluating AI-generated content credibility. Needs skills to verify AI outputs, identify hallucinations, and cross-reference claims before publishing.
Needs structured prompt engineering beyond basic ChatGPT usage. Must learn prompt debugging, iteration, and schema-based outputs for marketing workflows.
No agent experience. Needs to understand tool definitions and AI agent concepts to evaluate and communicate SAP's agent-based AI products (Joule).
Needs AI product thinking to bridge marketing and product. Understanding use-case selection and responsible deployment for accurate product messaging.
Needs evaluation skills to systematically assess AI-generated marketing content quality and accuracy.
Needs AI governance awareness for responsible AI messaging and compliance with marketing claims standards.
Needs marketing-specific AI ethics: content generation ethics, avoiding misleading AI claims.
